reviews.review_description: It looked like a really good game, but the controls are really clunky and it's frustrating trying to do anything. To say nothing for the fact that there's no way to adjust the height. I tried resetting the view  from the home menu, but nothing worked. I think I'll get a refund.
Too glitchy,use to be playable not now freezes every so often
I hope they fix this as I do like the concept

Someone else said this and I will too, the best chess game you can get here..
You can play at all levels from novic upwards and you have four types of locations and characters to play
What I really like is playing radom people on line at the same level you consider yourself to be.

The option to change your hight would be perfect for me.
As I am too low to the table when starting a game and have to go into settings to change floor settings which is annoying. 
Although I have a couple of chess games here on Quest this is the one I go for 9 times out of 10
Just love this game and a great price too.

I just bought this game and have been looking for about 20-30 minutes now trying to figure out how to adjust the height. can't even do it by holding the home button on Oculus like you can on other games. you know chess is a sitting game right? going to have to get a refund developers unless you can tell me what I am missing here because I just don't see anywhere to adjust the height to sit down. when I sit down the board comes up to my eye level which is unplayable. I would have assumed that would be first on the list of things to do seeing how different people are different heights. seriously? If there's something I'm missing please let me know and I'll be happy to fix my review otherwise it stands as is and I'm looking for a refund You've got about 5 days to respond

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We are sorry for the inconvenience.
Chess supports both standing and sitting position. Could you please try to do the following: quit the game, adjust your position to sit down, make sure the headset works properly when you sit down, that nothing is too high, and resume the game, or simply restart your headsets.

If none of these works could you please kindly let me know via email at contact@vrsuplife.com or Discord (https://discord.com/invite/tr4gh8Yt7N).

Sorry again for the inconvience but we sincerely hope to hear back from you.

reviews.review_description:
Game is nice but have you planned to add lichess / chess.com integration ?. 
It is so difficult to find good club players

Update 10/12/22
7 millions of mobile players ?. No.
Searching for an opponent and no seeking response
And there are only 37 reviews so very very few players

This game is great.  My favorite VR Chess game.  The graphics and environment are very cool and polished.  The only thing keeping me from a 5-star review is the lack of hand tracking.  There should at-least be an animation of your opponent actually picking up and moving his piece.  Otherwise this game is awesome.  I’m hoping this takes off and we will eventually get to see some new environments to play in or new skins for your board and pieces.

UPDATE: Just about everything I’ve wanted had been added to the game in an update.  This is the best chess app for the Quest as of now..  thanks for your hard work devs. 5-Stars.

developer_response.body: Hi JimiJames13, thank you for enjoying chess, if you have more suggestions, please do let know. We're keen to your feedback and will continue to polish the game.

reviews.review_description:
Game is now working great and very intuitively with hand tracking, a few negligible issues remaining. Like, I started without controllers and the hand tracking is clearly working fine and very snappy, but the initial tutorial seems to need you to press A on the controller. That said, after the initial setup, I could put controllers aside and use only my hands with not many issues. Had a beginner match in one of the many different rooms now, moving pieces just with your hands alone works very smoothly. 

Original review of earlier buggier version below.

You "sit" a few feet above the chair and you don't grab the pieces and move them around with hands at all, it's all crappy laser pointer, the simple way to port over a game from touchscreen. It's awful, sorry. Let me handle the pieces myself.

developer_response.body: Hi namekuseijin, thank you for your feedback. We know the game is still not perfect and has more potentials. We'll work harder to polish it. Please feel free to talk about the cons of chess with us

reviews.review_description: It is sometimes impossible to get the camera angle right. My view is either always too high or too low but rarely just right . Otherwise decent game when or if I finally get the angle right .
Played chess in my younger years figured I give it a try in VR and liked it.

developer_response.body:
Hi OldFart269, thank you for sharing your experience with us! We're delighted to hear that you decided to give our VR chess game a try and enjoyed it, especially considering your background in playing chess during your younger years.

We're thrilled to provide you with a new and immersive way to experience the game through virtual reality. Your support means a lot to us, and we look forward to accompanying you on your chess journey :)

reviews.review_description: Brill vr chess game but how do you play against a friend?

developer_response.body:
Hi, ianwithwhisk. Thank you for enjoying our game. Playing with a friend is on the way. We sincerely invite you to our discord(discord.chessvrgame.com) and be our first testing user if you'd like!

UPDATES:
Hi ianwithwhisk, as you requested, Friend Room is now available on chess game. Besides, we have added new features like  Avatar and Voice Chat, Hand Tracking,  more playing environments. Hope you like the new features. If you have more suggestions please let us know in the Discord(https://discord.gg/DSf7yaxBhU) and we hold an giveaway in the Discord.

reviews.review_description: Fascinating visual and good chess engine. This app also offers online playing. One has to be careful about moving the pieces, but I got used to it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and feedback. We’re glad to hear that you find the visuals fascinating and the chess engine to be good. We understand your concern regarding potential errors and we apologize for any frustration it may have caused. The dev team has received this feedback and are looking into ways of improving the gaming experience :)

reviews.review_description:
Not bad. Like another review said, seems like a port. Didn’t really implement any of the vr capabilities.  No voice, cannot talk with the opponent. 

Has more options than the last chess game though. 


Multiplayer is frustrating, it takes a while to find a player when it finally does every single player I have came across rage quits when the game seems to be tilt against them. 


Hard to review this one.

developer_response.body:
Hi wareix, We're so sorry you're experiencing issues with Chess VR. We're working on voice chat and online mode, so please keep an eye on the updates. You can join our discord(discord.chessvrgame.com) to experience our game in advance as a test user, and we're looking forward to your further feedbacks.

UPDATES:
Hi wareix, as you requested,Avatar and Voice Chat are available in the newest V3.00. Besides we have added new features like  Hand Tracking, Friend Room, more playing environments. Hope you like the new features. If you have more suggestions please let us know in the Discord(https://discord.gg/DSf7yaxBhU) and we hold an giveaway in the Discord.

reviews.review_description:
I like environments and animations with the Chess pieces. 
I have more chess games but I like this one over others. Great work.
Another applab that would be official…

developer_response.body: Hi NickbondVR, thank you sooooo much for enjoying chess. We're working on more new features, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Very well designed very definitely the best Chess game. I see big thanks to come to the development team in the future for this app as well as cannot wait for their next project

developer_response.body: Hi, Christopher Coons, I'm so glad you like and enjoy Chess VR. Please feel free to give us more details about what features would you like to see in Chess VR, maybe we are already working on some of them! Welcome to join our Discord: discord.chessvrgame.com

reviews.review_description: The position of the board and the headset is very off, have to keep force adjusting it via right controller meta key with headset in awkward positions until it's in the right place. The controllers/hand tracking is awful (why are my wrists twisted at horrifying angles?), and trying to click anything automatically triple clicks them. These are the major bugs, with plenty more weird and low quality issues, typos, etc on top of these.

developer_response.body: Hi pbbunny, thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback and bringing them to our attention.  We sincerely apologize for the frustrating experience you've had with the game. We take all player feedback seriously, especially when it comes to technical issues that impact gameplay. We're truly sorry for the poor experience you've had, and we're committed to improving the game.

reviews.review_title: Not 100%  as depicted in the trailer
reviews.review_description:
Just got this game so I could play with some of the CPU characters shown in the trailer. Nada, zilch, NOTHING shows up on the other side of the board in the Japan environment just the game pieces that move on their own. Gameplay is okay, so if you want basic chess, yes this offers that.  Chess Club VR outshines this for better graphics and online play.

The new update will not let me choose anything. Unable to play.

developer_response.body:
Hi 12Sam1,

We are sorry to hear that after the update the game was unable to play. We did not encounter this during test and it seems not a common issue. Could you please provide us with more details here or if you want we are more than happy to get in touch with you in our discord channel (https://discord.com/invite/tr4gh8Yt7N) to get to know more about the issue and figure out a solution? 

Apologies for the late relply and looking forward to hearing from you!  All the best

Remove space before .com
I just learned to play chess (only took 38 years) and now I’m addicted like none other. The 2 best parts of the game is that it’s very accurate hand tracking system and the puzzles.
